licensing.certificate:
<#if tls\-version?has_content || cipher\-suite?has_content>
            
              <#if tls\-version?has_content>
                
                  tlscmn:${tls\-version}
                
              </#if>
              <#if cipher\-suite?has_content>
                
                  tlscsa:${cipher\-suite}
                
              </#if>
            
          </#if>
          <#if pinned\-ca\-list?has_content>
            
              ${pinned\-ca\-list}
            
           <#elseif server\-auth\-est\-profile\-name?has_content>
            
              ${server\-auth\-est\-profile\-name}
            
          </#if>
	  <#if certificate?has_content || client\-auth\-est\-profile\-name?has_content>
            
              
                <#if certificate?has_content>
                  
                    ${certificate}
                  
                <#else>
                  
                    ${client\-auth\-est\-profile\-name}
                  
                </#if>
              
            
          </#if>
